name: Scallop Door Wall Decal Fresh Melon - Pillowfort™
description: Add a pop of color to your kid's room with this Fresh Melon Scallop Door Wall Decal from Pillowfort™. This 12-piece wall decal set showcases a scalloped design in a fresh melon hue to bring a vibrant touch to their room, and the decals feature a self-adhesive application for quick installation. Use them to style the area around the door or on bare walls for a unique look.
